positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a soaring golden hawk in mid-flight against a gradient backdrop of deep sapphire blue fading to warm cream. The hawk should be rendered in a clean, stark silhouette, with highly detailed feathers suggesting motion and power. Use negative space strategically to enhance the feeling of lift and freedom. The composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for large apparel printing. The art style should be hyper-detailed linework combined with graphic, bold color blocking, giving it a sophisticated vintage Americana feel. Sunlight should back-light the hawk, creating a dramatic, glowing edge halo (rim lighting). Flat graphic design principles mixed with classical illustration techniques. Vector art aesthetics, high contrast, vibrant colors, clean lines, professional print artwork.
